response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong fundamentals in TDD, distributed systems, and TypeScript/Node.js, plus recent exposure to MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, or major cloud AI platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure AI services), which are core requirements for this Staff GenAI role. The 8+ years of AI-specific experience requirement is not clearly met — AI work appears limited to ~1 year of recent MCP/agent tooling.
strengths: Strong senior engineering background with TypeScript, Node.js, and distributed systems at scale
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Proven technical leadership through workshops, mentoring, and founding GISCollective
concerns: No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Limited evidence of designing AI systems on major cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure)
AI/GenAI experience appears to be ~1 year, well short of the 8+ years required

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow exposure
